raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I paid {$84.00} for an appliance service that was scheduled for XX/XX/XXXX. I was told by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX to run the washing machine to be sure the problem still existed before they came to the house. After I performed the check and found the machine to be working satisfactorily, I canceled the service call on XX/XX/XXXX. The person on the line said I would receive a refund. 

After about a month XXXX XXXX XXXX had not issued the refund. I then filed a dispute with XXXX XXXX where the original charge was made. They credited my account. Best Buy Citi then issued their own credit. XXXX XXXX put the charge back on my card. 

Then Best Buy Citi decided to removed the credit they had given me and placed several letters in a Documents folder within my account. I could not access the Letters in the Documents folder and sent them emails to this effect. Then I was on vacation out of the country from XX/XX/XXXX to XXXX. Their last Letter was put in the Document folder on XX/XX/XXXX saying that they were not giving me a credit because I had not supplied them with information they were requesting. I filed another dispute through the Best Buy Citi website on or about XX/XX/XXXX and have not heard from them since. I recently asked Best Buy Citi through their Disputes page if they would notify me how much longer they would need for a decision but they have not responded to that request nor my XX/XX/XXXX dispute.
